verses.first: Baal Samay Ravi Bhakshi Liyo Tab, Teenahu Lok Bhayo Andhiyaro
verses.second: Tahi Son Traas Bhayo Jag Ko, Yeh Sankat Kahu Son Jaat Na Taaro

verses.first: Devan Aani Kari Binti Tab, Chhandi Diyo Ravi Kasht Nivaro
verses.second: Ko Nahin Jaanat Hai Jag Mein Kapi, Sankatmochan Naam Tiharo

verses.first: Bali Ki Traas Kapees Basai Giri, Jaat Mahaprabhu Panth Niharo
verses.second: Chaunki Mahamuni Shaap Diyo Tab, Chahiye Kaun Bichar Bicharo

verses.first: Kaidho Hanu Tab Hoye Sahay, Mahashay Son Nahi Jaat Ubaro
verses.second: Ko Nahin Jaanat Hai Jag Mein Kapi, Sankatmochan Naam Tiharo

verses.first: Angad Ke Sang Len Gaye Siy, Khoj Kapees Yeh Bain Ucharo
verses.second: Jeevat Na Bachiho Ham So Ju, Bina Sudhi Laaye Ihan Pagu Dharo

verses.first: Heri Thake Tat Sindhu Sabai Tab, Laaye Siya Sudhi Praan Ubaro
verses.second: Ko Nahin Jaanat Hai Jag Mein Kapi, Sankatmochan Naam Tiharo

verses.first: Raavan Traas Dai Siy Ko Sab, Rakshasi Son Kahi Shok Nivaro
verses.second: Taahi Samay Hanuman Mahaprabhu, Jaaye Maha Rajnichar Maro

verses.first: Chahat Seey Ashok Son Aagi Su, Dai Prabhu Mudrika Shok Nivaro
verses.second: Ko Nahin Jaanat Hai Jag Mein Kapi, Sankatmochan Naam Tiharo

verses.first: Baan Lagyo Ur Lachhiman Ke Tab, Praan Taje Sut Raavan Maro
verses.second: Lai Grih Baidya Sushen Samet, Tabai Giri Dron Su Beer Uparo

verses.first: Aani Sajeevan Haath Dai Tab, Lachhiman Ke Tum Praan Ubaro
verses.second: Ko Nahin Jaanat Hai Jag Mein Kapi, Sankatmochan Naam Tiharo

verses.first: Raavan Juddh Ajaan Kiyo Tab, Naag Ki Phaans Sabai Sir Daaro
verses.second: Shri Raghunath Samet Sabai Dal, Moh Bhayo Yeh Sankat Bhaaro

verses.first: Aani Khages Tabai Hanuman Ju, Bandhan Kaati Sutraas Nivaro
verses.second: Ko Nahin Jaanat Hai Jag Mein Kapi, Sankatmochan Naam Tiharo

verses.first: Bandhu Samet Jabai Ahiraavan, Lai Raghunath Paataal Sidharo
verses.second: Debihin Pooji Bhali Bidhi Son Bali, Deu Sabai Mili Mantra Bicharo

verses.first: Jaaye Sahay Bhayo Tab Hi, Ahiraavan Sainya Samet Sanharo
verses.second: Ko Nahin Jaanat Hai Jag Mein Kapi, Sankatmochan Naam Tiharo

verses.first: Kaaj Kiye Bad Devan Ke Tum, Veer Mahaprabhu Dekhi Vicharo
verses.second: Kaun So Sankat Mor Gareeb Ko, Jo Tumson Nahin Jaat Hai Taaro

verses.first: Begi Haro Hanuman Mahaprabhu, Jo Kuchh Sankat Hoye Hamaro
verses.second: Ko Nahin Jaanat Hai Jag Mein Kapi, Sankatmochan Naam Tiharo
